sourceRef.citation: Mohammed Ali Mohammed Al-Qadasi et al. 2028

statement.en: Integrated circuits for photonic computing and sensing
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Abstract content is embargoed and unavailable. No substantive claim can be evaluated without access to the thesis body. The axiom itself is observation-impossible in its current form.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 光が電子論理へと変身する瞬間の、謎めいた等価性。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 光線が結晶格子を貫き、一つの中心に集束し、その奥底で電子は目覚める。
